scripts.dev:up: docker compose up -d && npm run db:migrate -w api && npm run db:seed -w api
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate -w api && npm run db:seed -w api
scripts.build:local: docker build --target api-prod -t eteg-api-prod . && docker run --network=host --env-file .env eteg-api-prod
